content.full_text:
October 6, 1992

Ms. Carla Wordlow
California Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Dear Ms. Wordlow:

Per our latest discussion regarding Peter Bedford, an appointed member of the California Arts Council, I would very much hope that you could provide some clarification on Disclosure Category I. Specifically, what exactly does Mr. Bedford need to report? It is our understanding that he only needs to report arts organizations which may or may not be applicants to the California Arts Council and not individuals who would be making purchases from the Montgomery Gallery and Bedford Arts. The California Arts Council only provides support for arts organizations, not individual consumers.

I would appreciate clarification on this matter and look forward to hearing from you at your earliest convenience.

Sincerely,

Joanne C. Kozberg
Director

JCK:aa
